entry.title: Apple unseats Nvidia to become world's most valuable company as AI bets shift - Reuters
entry.summary: Apple unseats Nvidia to become world's most valuable company as AI bets shift Reuters — Also covered by: The Guardian AI

entry.title: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores
entry.summary: Official estimates Google and Apple likely made millions in nudify app fees. — Also covered by: Wired AI

entry.title: Inkling: Our open-weights model
entry.summary: Inkling: Our open-weights model Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab just released their first open-weights model. Inkling is "a Mixture-of-Experts transformer with 975B total parameters, 41B active" - an Apache-2.0 licensed multimodal model trained on 45 trillion tokens of text, images, audio and video. They're also pr — Also covered by: HN: LLM (100+ points)

entry.title: OpenAI Details GPT-Red: An Internal Automated Red-Teaming Model That Beat Human Red-Teamers 84% To 13% On Prompt Injection - MarkTechPost
entry.summary: OpenAI Details GPT-Red: An Internal Automated Red-Teaming Model That Beat Human Red-Teamers 84% To 13% On Prompt Injection MarkTechPost — Also covered by: MarkTechPost

entry.title: A scorecard for the AI age
entry.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenaAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

entry.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
entry.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedge

entry.title: llama.cpp b10064 released
entry.summary: opencl: transpose q4_K noshuffle scales for coalesced reads ( #25805 ) Website: https://llama.app macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) DISABLED macOS Intel (x64) iOS XCFramework Linux: Ubuntu x64 (CPU) Ubuntu arm64 (CPU) Ubuntu s390x (CPU) Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu arm64

entry.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
entry.summary: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

entry.title: Blue Owl-Backed Latigo Files for IPO, Adding to Biotech Pipeline
entry.summary: Latigo Biotherapeutics Inc. filed for an initial public offering, joining a growing list of biotechnology firms considering going public as soon as this quarter.

entry.title: Just Keep Prompting: Evaluating Repetitive Socratic Prompting in VLMs
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.14099v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in real-world settings requires not only strong visual reasoning but also stability under sustained conversational pressure. We introduce Just Keep Prompting (JKP), a multi-turn evaluation framework that measures VLM epistemic stabi

entry.title: Weave Robotics launches Isaac, its first mobile humanoid robot
entry.summary: Weave Robotics has listed the features of its Isaac wheeled bimanual manipulator robot for household and office use. The post Weave Robotics launches Isaac, its first mobile humanoid robot appeared first on The Robot Report .

entry.title: Moonshot's open-source Kimi K3 model beats Anthropic's Fable 5 on this benchmark
entry.summary: Our AI Model Release Tracker keeps new models in context with their peers, so you know which are worth your time.

entry.title: Kimi K3 is no reason for China panic
entry.summary: Transformer Weekly: NY data center moratorium, NDAA export controls and Amodei’s $1m to safety super PAC

entry.title: LBA: Textual Hard-Label Adversarial Attack under Low Query Budgets
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.14101v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generating high-quality adversarial texts with low query budgets remains a challenging problem in the hard-label scenario. Most existing approaches rely on greedy algorithms, where one position in the text is selected for substitution, followed by the substitutions of oth

entry.title: GoldenEyeDog Subgroup Linked to DigiCert Breach and Code-Signing Certificate Theft
entry.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have attributed the April 2026 DigiCert security incident to a threat activity cluster dubbed CylindricalCanine. Expel, which shared technical details of the event, described the threat actor as a sub-group of GoldenEyeDog (aka APT-Q-27, Dragon Breath, and Miuuti Group), a Chinese cybercrime g

entry.title: Three Steps to the Terminal: A Siemens ROX II Zero-Day Trilogy
entry.summary: A technical analysis of three chained zero-day vulnerabilities in Siemens ROX II OT switches that allow privilege escalation and persistent root access. The post Three Steps to the Terminal: A Siemens ROX II Zero-Day Trilogy appeared first on Unit 42 .

entry.title: Quoting Kimi K3
entry.summary: Is there something I can actually help you with today? — Kimi K3 , after refusing to leak its system prompt Tags: kimi , ai-personality , generative-ai , ai , llms

entry.title: Quantum Compositional NLP for Arabic: Grammar, Morphology, and Word Sense in Circuit Topology
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.14100v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present the first application of pregroup grammar-based quantum compositional natural language processing (QNLP) to Arabic; a morphologically rich, free-word-order language whose structural complexity provides a uniquely demanding testbed for theories of meaning compos

entry.title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
Why the Moonshot Moment May Not Be a DeepSeek Moment
entry.summary: History doesn’t always repeat itself.

entry.title: Sources: Apple and the DOJ are in early discussions about settling a 2024 antitrust lawsuit alleging that Apple violated antitrust laws (Bloomberg)
entry.summary: Bloomberg : Sources: Apple and the DOJ are in early discussions about settling a 2024 antitrust lawsuit alleging that Apple violated antitrust laws — Apple Inc. and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws.

entry.title: ASML plans to give its ~45K employees globally a €20K bonus, issued as a share award that vests in 2030, joining other chip industry companies offering payouts (Sarah Jacob/Bloomberg)
entry.summary: Sarah Jacob / Bloomberg : ASML plans to give its ~45K employees globally a €20K bonus, issued as a share award that vests in 2030, joining other chip industry companies offering payouts — ASML Holding NV will give employees globally a one-time €20,000 ($22,862) bonus, joining other firms in the chip industry

entry.title: New NadMesh Botnet Hunts Exposed AI Services for Cloud Keys and Kubernetes Tokens
entry.summary: A Go botnet called NadMesh turned up in early July hunting exposed AI services, and the operator's own dashboard claims 3,811 unique AWS keys. A Shodan harvester keeps the scan queue stocked with ComfyUI, Ollama, n8n, Open WebUI, Langflow, and Gradio: the image generators, local model runners, and workflow builders tha

entry.title: ik_llama.cpp vs llama.cpp: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP Text + Vision on Apple M5 Max
entry.summary: Straight, the conclusion of the run on apple m5 max: ik_llama.cpp won this CPU/ARM comparison clearly. It was 20.8% faster overall , with its largest advantage in text generation. Vision and post-vision generation also remained faster. Result Case ik_llama.cpp llama.cpp Lead Overall 65.71 tok/s 54.27 tok/s +20.8% Text

entry.title: Branching Policy Optimization: Sandbox-Native Language Agent Reinforcement Learning
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.14171v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning has emerged as the dominant paradigm for training large language model (LLM) agents that interact with executable sandboxes. State-of-the-art algorithms such as PPO, RLOO, and GRPO inherit their rollout topology from RLHF: for each prompt, N indepen

entry.title: ollama v0.32.1 released
entry.summary: What's Changed Improved Gemma 4 tool calling and multi-turn reasoning, including more reliable tool-response continuations Fixed a recurrent MLX model cache leak that could increase memory use across requests, and improved cache snapshot performance MLX text model loading now respects OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT Agent web sear

entry.title: San Antonio to Borrow $944 Million for Major Airport Expansion
entry.summary: San Antonio, one of the fastest-growing US metro areas, is tapping the bond market for almost $1 billion as part of an ambitious program to expand and improve its airport.

entry.title: Telecom Italia Is Said to Consider €10.8 Billion Poste Bid Fair
entry.summary: Telecom Italia SpA’s board is leaning toward endorsing Poste Italiane SpA’s €10.8 billion ($12.4 billion) takeover offer as fair, and is unlikely to seek a higher price, according to people familiar with the matter.

entry.title: Following the questions where they lead
entry.summary: Assistant Professor Bailey Flanigan has arrived at complex computational methods for helping democracy thrive.

entry.title: Interventional Grounding Audits: Black-Box Premise-Dependency Tests for LLM Chain-of-Thought via Predicate Substitution
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.13069v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models produce chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that appears logically sound yet may not genuinely depend on its stated premises. We introduce interventional grounding audits, a black-box, step-level test of premise dependency: we intervene on a single prem
